title: dalbergia boehmii
intro: Dalbergia boehmii, also known as the African rosewood or African panga, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Dalbergia boehmii include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. Herbal preparations of Dalbergia boehmii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically proven.
